title: Hot action in SWD cricket
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill SWD...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League competition resumed this past Saturday after the holiday break and produced some interesting results.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League competition resumed this past Saturday after the holiday break and produced some interesting results."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The defending champions, Pacaltsdorp United, playing at home, were restricted to 156 against Union Stars II thanks to some tight bowling by Corné Kennedy (4/39) and Lifa Ntanzi (3/30)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The experienced Warren Bell (60) added a solid and valuable half-century.","html":"The experienced Warren Bell (60) added a solid and valuable half-century."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Union Stars II batting crumbled against Ricardo Majolla (4/4) and Anoxolo Kitshini 4/31) as the visitors were dismissed for only 81, giving Pacaltsdorp a 68-run bonus-point victory.","html":"The Union Stars II batting crumbled against Ricardo Majolla (4/4) and Anoxolo Kitshini 4/31) as the visitors were dismissed for only 81, giving Pacaltsdorp a 68-run bonus-point victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Top of the table","html":"Top of the table"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With this victory Pacaltsdorp now join Union Stars I at the top of the table.","html":"With this victory Pacaltsdorp now join Union Stars I at the top of the table."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George produced their best performance of the season as they defeated Sussex, who were the joint log leaders before the weekend's action, by eight wickets at Rooirivierrif.","html":"George produced their best performance of the season as they defeated Sussex, who were the joint log leaders before the weekend's action, by eight wickets at Rooirivierrif."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex were bowled out for a competitive 171, with provincial players Kelly Smuts (4/24) and Khwezi Gumede (3/43) the best bowlers for George.","html":"Sussex were bowled out for a competitive 171, with provincial players Kelly Smuts (4/24) and Khwezi Gumede (3/43) the best bowlers for George."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Knysna Cavaliers triumph"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In a mouthwatering encounter at the Military Sports Club, the home side, Harlequins Forces, posted a competitive 193 thanks to a half-century by Hlompo Modimokoane (56).","html":"In a mouthwatering encounter at the Military Sports Club, the home side, Harlequins Forces, posted a competitive 193 thanks to a half-century by Hlompo Modimokoane (56)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Knysna Cavaliers (194/9) clinched a nail-biting one-wicket victory thanks to a 62-run partnership for the ninth wicket between the 19-year-old pair of Stefan May (63) and Charl-Francois Marais (28*)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For Harlequins, Rhupino Plaatjies bagged 4/38.","html":"For Harlequins, Rhupino Plaatjies bagged 4/38."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
